name: code-critter
description: Powers the live tiles (Fleet, Session Status, Session, and the companion's mood) of the Code Critter Stream Deck plugin by recording local session state to ~/.claude/deck-state. Tokens, cost and activity work without it; this adds the live session/fleet view. 100% local, no network, zero dependency: a single Bash script run by the shell Claude Code already uses for hooks (works on macOS, Linux and Windows/Git Bash).
